# Corporate Ladder

> Corporate Ladder is a satirical office climb game in Telegram. Tap left or right, dodge meetings and reorgs, climb the org chart. Play free via @CorporateLadderBot.

## Play
- [Telegram bot](https://t.me/CorporateLadderBot): Primary entry point
- [Mini App shell](https://www.promptanatomy.lol/): Web shell opened from Telegram

## About
- [Prompt Anatomy](https://www.promptanatomy.app): Parent brand

## Assets
- [Link preview image](https://www.promptanatomy.lol/og.png): 1200×630 OG image
